name: Tomato Cheese Souffle
recipeIngredient: A few grains of Cayenne pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan.
2. Add the flour, salt, and cayenne pepper to the melted butter. Stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add the tomato juice, stirring constantly.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the grated cheddar cheese until well combined.
6. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
7. Beat the egg yolks with a pinch of salt.
8. Gently fold the beaten egg yolks into the cheese mixture.
9. In a separate clean bowl, beat the egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form.
10. Carefully fold the beaten egg whites into the cheese mixture until well combined.
11. Grease a baking dish and pour in the souffle batter.
12. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 50 minutes.
13. For individual servings, pour portions of the mixture into greased ramekins or individual baking dishes.
14. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for an additional 30 minutes.
15. Serve and enjoy! Serves 4-6
Source: Heritage Recipes ch.
